allowed_use: Non-diagnostic screening-awareness prompt recommending an actual blood-pressure measurement.
approved_user_facing_interpretation: Your answers suggest that checking your blood pressure with a validated measurement would be worthwhile. This is not a diagnosis.
prohibited_uses: medication or treatment recommendations based on the model
claims that the user has hypertension
displaying the model output as clinical certainty
approval_rationale: The frozen model met the prespecified locked-test sensitivity objective, but modest discrimination, low specificity and low positive predictive value require a non-diagnostic awareness-only use with confirmatory blood-pressure measurement.
known_limitations: Low specificity produces many false-positive screening prompts.
Low positive predictive value prevents diagnostic interpretation.
The model was developed from LASI Wave 1 participants aged 45 years and older without a previous hypertension diagnosis.
The target is derived from survey blood-pressure measurements and is not a clinical hypertension diagnosis.
Generalizability beyond the development population has not been established.
